actions.script: async function fetchWithRetry(url,retries,delay){for(var attempt=0;attempt<=retries;attempt++){var resp=await fetch(url,{credentials:'include'});if(resp.ok){var text=await resp.text();if(text.trim().charAt(0)==='<'){if(attempt<retries){await new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,delay*(attempt+1))});continue;}throw new Error('Wayback API returned HTML (status '+resp.status+') after '+(retries+1)+' attempts');}return JSON.parse(text);}if(resp.status===429||resp.status>=500){if(attempt<retries){await new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,delay*(attempt+1))});continue;}}throw new Error('Wayback API error: HTTP '+resp.status+' after '+(retries+1)+' attempts');}return null;} async function fetchAllForDomain(domain){var allSnapshots=[];var key=null;do{var url='/cdx/search/cdx?url='+encodeURIComponent(domain+'/')+'&filter=statuscode:200&filter=mimetype:text/html&limit=-100&output=json&showResumeKey=true&collapse=timestamp:6';if(key)url+='&resumeKey='+encodeURIComponent(key);var data=await fetchWithRetry(url,3,3000);if(!data||data.length<2){key=null;break;}var headers=data[0];var tsIdx=headers.indexOf('timestamp');var origIdx=headers.indexOf('original');key=null;for(var i=1;i<data.length;i++){var row=data[i];if(!row||row.length===0)continue;if(row.length===1&&typeof row[0]==='string'&&row[0].length>20){key=row[0];continue;}if(row.length>Math.max(tsIdx,origIdx)){allSnapshots.push({timestamp:row[tsIdx],original:row[origIdx]});}}}while(key);var result={};result.domain_name=domain;result.total_snapshots=allSnapshots.length;result.wayback_urls=allSnapshots.map(function(s){return 'https://web.archive.org/web/'+s.timestamp+'/'+s.original;});if(allSnapshots.length>0){var sorted=allSnapshots.slice().sort(function(a,b){return a.timestamp.localeCompare(b.timestamp);});var earliest=sorted[0];var latest=sorted[sorted.length-1];result.home_page_url='https://web.archive.org/web/'+earliest.timestamp+'/'+earliest.original;var et=earliest.timestamp;result.earliest_date=et.substring(0,4)+'-'+et.substring(4,6)+'-'+et.substring(6,8);var lt=latest.timestamp;result.latest_date=lt.substring(0,4)+'-'+lt.substring(4,6)+'-'+lt.substring(6,8);}result.status=allSnapshots.length>0?'success':'not_found';return result;} var domainList='${domains}'.split(',').map(function(d){return d.trim()}).filter(function(d){return d.length>0}); var allResults=[]; for(var idx=0;idx<domainList.length;idx++){try{var res=await fetchAllForDomain(domainList[idx]);allResults.push(res);}catch(err){allResults.push({domain_name:domainList[idx],status:'error',error:err.message});}} return JSON.stringify({total_domains:domainList.length,results:allResults});
